system.description:
### Tier 1 Horde (1/HP) Synthetic-organic "zombies" created from the bodies of organic beings. Motives & Tactics: Grapple, overwhelm, chase

#### Features Horde (1d6+1) - Passive: When the Husks have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+1 physical damage instead.

Terrifying Hiss (Passive): When the Husks make a successful attack, the target must mark a Stress. }}

{{adversary,
